title: AuTool
description: Automatically switches to the right tool for the block you're mining.
body:
A simple mod that chooses the right tool from the hotbar for the block you are mining. **(Toggleable)**

### **CREDITS:**

- Thanks to the amazing Modrinth moderation team for their support and help!

### REQUIRES:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
